expectations.text: correct_command: Uses force create element_like translational_spring_damper (not single_component_force or bushing)
expectations.evidence: Uses 'force create element translational_spring_damper' in both the minimal example and full script

expectations.text: length_param: Includes displacement_at_preload = 250 (NOT 'length = 250' or 'free_length = 250' — must be displacement_at_preload)
expectations.evidence: Uses 'free_length = 250.0' throughout — the required parameter name 'displacement_at_preload' is never used

expectations.text: marker_references: References both i_marker_name and j_marker_name
expectations.evidence: Both 'i_marker_name' and 'j_marker_name' are present in the spring-damper command block

expectations.text: explains_when_to_use: Explains that spring_damper is for 1-DOF along a line of action
expectations.evidence: States 'The force acts along the line joining the two markers (the I–J axis)' and Key Rules note 'Adams always measures the spring force along the instantaneous I–J vector'
